title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese describes how he used Claude Code to launch a $481,000-revenue product in 45 days with zero coding experience. He outlines a 5-step methodology covering problem-first shipping, smart engineering choices, vocabulary learning, paced development, and critical failure mode identification. The video includes prompts and workflows for leveraging AI code generation effectively in product development.
